titles.title: Oh The Glory Of Your Presence

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh the glory of Your presence We Your temple Give You reverence So arise to Your rest And be blessed by our praise As we glory in Your embrace As Your presence Now fills this place

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus all glorious Create in us a temple Called as living stones Where You're enthroned As You rose from death in pow'r

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So rise within our worship Rise upon our praise And let the hand that saw You raised Clothe us in Your glory Draw us by Your grace
